1: The graves are ready are ready for me.
2: And doth not mine eye continue in their provocation?
3: Who is is he that that will strike hands with me?
4: Therefore shalt thou not exalt them them .
5: Even the eyes of his children shall fail.
6: And aforetime I was as a tabret.
7: And all my members are are as a shadow.
8: And the innocent shall stir up himself against the hypocrite.
9: And he that hath clean hands shall be stronger and stronger.
10: For I cannot find one one wise man man among you.
11: Even Even the thoughts of my heart.
12: The light is is short because of darkness.
13: I have made my bed in the darkness.
14: To the worm, Thou art Thou art my mother, and my sister.
15: As for my hope, who shall see it?
16: When our our rest together is is in the dust.
